name: @senad-d/observme
description: ObservMe: a Pi extension that instruments Pi agent sessions and exports OpenTelemetry traces, metrics, and logs to an external observability stack (OTel Collector, Grafana Tempo/Loki/Prometheus).
author: Senad Dizdarević <112484166+senad-d@users.noreply.github.com>

_template.comment: package.json is strict JSON, so this _template block is the inline template note instead of // comments. Remove it once the first real command/tool replaces the template examples.
renameChecklist: Replace name with the final npm package name, for example @your-scope/my-pi-extension.
Replace description, author, repository, bugs, and homepage with the new project details.
Keep the pi.extensions entry pointed at the exported extension entry file, or update it if you move src/extension.ts.
Replace example command and tool names in src/commands and src/tools so they match the new extension purpose.
Update README.md, docs/STRUCTURE.md, CHANGELOG.md, SECURITY.md, and GitHub templates before publishing.

scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:eslint && npm run format:check && npm run check
scripts.check: node --check scripts/check-package-contents.mjs && node --check scripts/test-coverage.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-observability.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-packaged-install.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-handler-execution.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-pi-lifecycle.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run check:pack && npm run smoke:packaged && npm run smoke:handlers && npm run smoke:pi-lifecycle
